Robert Wildgoose - Portfolio Of Work

Morsed

A free morse code translation application, allowing the user to translate from free text to morse code and morse code to free text as well.
The ability to share translation on other applications.

iPad Screenshots

iPhone Screenshots

Release Notes

Version 2.6.0

This release has some minor fixes as well as adding German to the list of languages.

15 May 2022

Version 2.5.0

In this update, I have made changes to the onboarding screens to make it easier to navigate.
I have also added symbols into the translatable characters.

13 April 2022

Version 2.3.0

Changed the over all design of the app
Logo change
Fixed a few minor bugs relating to audio translations
Added sectioning to the guide book to divide Letters and Numbers

25 October 2021

Version 2.2.1

I've added some behind the scenes bug fixes and performance enhancements.

2 September 2021

Version 2.2.0

I've added some behind the scenes work to make things a bit cleaner as well as changing the design slightly.

13 July 2021

Version 2.1.2

This new version includes some performance and translation updates to keep the app running smoothly.

19 June 2021

Version 2.1.1

Small Fixes Relating To App Start Up
Small Fixes Relating To Translations

3 Jun 2021

Version 2.1.0

Logo Changes
UI Changes
Start Up Screen
Ability To Translate To Audio

1 Jun 2021

Version 2.0.1

Fixed issue with certain characters and numbers not translating.
Added Dutch to the selectable languages.
Small UI Changes.

14 Apr 2021

Version 1.10.1

In this version I have added support for the following languages / English / Thai / Mandarin Chinese / Hindi / Spanish / French

17 Nov 2020

Version 1.9.3

This release contains bug fixes as well as push notification integration.

29 Jun 2020

Version 1.9.2

A New Tabbed Layout
Bug Fixes
Colour Change

31 May 2020

Version 1.8.1

This version includes "Audio Morsed" allowing users to type a message and have the translated morse code played back to them, this feature had been requested in reviews multiple times and is only the first addition with Audio Morsed.

30 March 2020

Version 1.7.2

I've cleaned up some bugs as well as adding support for emojis. You can now replace those dots and dashes with emojis to add that extra layer of amusement to your Morsed conversations.

28 Feb 2020

Version 1.6.1

I've cleared up the UI so that it follows suit throughout the app
Removed the Dark Mode switch originally added and integrated Native Dark Mode
Fixed a few issues within the iMessage Extensions not auto translating on selection.

16 Feb 2020

Version 1.5.2

Fixed a few issues with translation sometimes missing letters. Implemented new iMessage functionality, this allows users to send Morsed messages directly from the messages application.

8 Feb 2020

Version 1.4.1

In this version I've added a new "Morse Code Guide" allowing users to see all characters side by side translations.

4 Jan 2020

Version 1.3.1

In this version, numerical translations have been added as well as some minor bug fixes.

6 Dec 2019

Version 1.3.0

This version contains a total redesign of the app, including dark mode. The ability to share translations over other apps is now live allowing you to use your messages in WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger and more. The biggest improvement within this release is the size of the application from the previous 66mb

7 Nov 2019

Version 1.0.1

Initial App Release

21 June 2019
